prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-FLYINGDISC-ORG-KPKO Product Type: TOYS_AND_GAMES Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Light Up 10 Inch Flying Disc Kids Outdoor Summer Toy - Orange Description: Promote exercise during playtime with the Kidplokio Light Up Flying Disc.

This classic kids' toy is great for encouraging kids to run around and get some exercise while having fun outdoors with their friends. The disc has a 10" diameter and is easy for kids of all ages to play with. It comes with three 1.5V LR41 batteries that make the disc light up during flight, so kids will love playing with this toy day or night.

The flying disc is constructed of durable plastic that will ensure hours and hours of fun, and the bright green color makes it easy to spot so you don't have to worry about it getting lost. Even adults will like joining in on the fun. Additionally, it doubles as a great fetch toy for dogs. This is a must-have outdoor toy, whether you're hosting a bbq in the back yard, camping or hanging out at the beach. Search Terms: flying discs frisbees outdoor toys picnic toys camping toys high flyers kids outdoor fun toys promoting exercise light up toys space travel toys pool party pool toys orange neon toys outdoor playtime boys exercise girls gifts boys gifts birthday Features: - CLASSIC OUTDOOR TOY - Flying Disc is Universally Loved by Children and Adults - Add some Fun Competition to Your Next Outdoor Party - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Made of High Quality Plastic | Great for Play Rain or Shine | High Visibility Orange Easy to Spot - LIGHTS UP - Comes with Three 1.5V LR41 Batteries | Disc Lights Up During Flight for Cool Flying Effect - PROMOTES EXERCISE - Catch the Flying Disc Game Encourages Kids to Exercise During Outdoor Playtime - 10 INCH DIAMETER - Large Flying Disc is Easy for Kids to Catch - Teaches Them Hand-Eye Coordination === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Kidplokio 10 Inch Orange Light Up Flying Disc

openai.item_name: Kidplokio 10-in Orange Light Up Flying Disc

anthropic.title_differentiation: Lights Up In Flight, Durable Plastic, High Visibility Orange, Promotes Exercise, Includes 3 LR41 Batteries

openai.title_differentiation: Durable Plastic, Lights During Flight, Promotes Exercise, Easy To Catch, Great For Outdoor Play And Dog Fetch
